components.name: @inkjs/ui
components.author: Vadim Demedes
components.description: Collection of customizable UI components for CLIs made with Ink

components.name: @ioredis/commands
components.author: Zihua Li <i@zihua.li> (http://zihua.li)
components.description: Redis commands

components.name: @mailwoman/address-id
components.description: Turn a canonicalized + geocoded address into a stable, parseable primary key (`<state>.<H3-cell>.<hash>`) for deterministic record joins / dedup — the exact-match complement to the fuzzy matcher.

components.name: @mailwoman/ban
components.description: Base Adresse Nationale (France) rooftop address-point ingestion — builds the national FR precision shard on the situs address-point schema.

components.name: @mailwoman/classifiers
components.description: Mailwoman rule-based classifiers.

components.name: @mailwoman/codex
components.description: Per-address-system postal reference data + branded types (USPS street suffixes, US ZIP codes). Pure, zero-runtime-dep — the shared canonical home for postal-system primitives the parser, resolver, and synthesis layers all reach for.

components.name: @mailwoman/core
components.description: Mailwoman core: tokenization, classification primitives, solver, formatter, resources, filters, solvers, utils.

components.name: @mailwoman/corpus
components.description: Mailwoman corpus pipeline: BIO-labeled dataset builder for the neural classifier.

components.name: @mailwoman/formatter
components.description: The inverse of the parser: render Mailwoman `ComponentTag` components into an idiomatic, locale-aware address string — plus a canonical, normalized match key for record linkage. Consolidates the former core/formatter stub and corpus synthesis formatter behind one API.

components.name: @mailwoman/kind-classifier
components.description: Stage 2.5 of the runtime pipeline — categorize inputs by query shape (postcode_only / locality_only / structured_address / intersection / po_box / landmark / vague). Rule-based for v1.

components.name: @mailwoman/locale-gate
components.description: Stage 2 of the runtime pipeline — derive a LocaleHint from QueryShape (script + known-format hits). Rule-based v1; trained classifier deferred to v0.6.0.

components.name: @mailwoman/match
components.description: The geocode-first record matcher: block → score → cluster. This first cut ships the string comparators (Jaro / Jaro-Winkler + an edit-distance fallback for compound surnames) that the Fellegi-Sunter scorer is built on.

components.name: @mailwoman/neural
components.description: Mailwoman neural classifier runtime: SentencePiece tokenizer + ONNX inference + decoder wiring.

components.name: @mailwoman/normalize
components.description: Stage 1 of the runtime pipeline — deterministic input preprocessing (Unicode NFC, punctuation, whitespace, abbreviation). Pure functions, no ML.

components.name: @mailwoman/phrase-grouper
components.description: Stage 2.7 of the runtime pipeline — propose coherent input units (boundary discovery) with a structural kind hypothesis + confidence. Rule-based v1 (port of v1 section/sub-section logic); learned 1-2M-param span proposer reserved for v0.5.1.

components.name: @mailwoman/query-shape
components.description: Cheap structural priors for the runtime pipeline: character class, segmentation, known-format detection. Pure functions, no ML.

components.name: @mailwoman/record
components.description: Lean, plain-TypeScript record schema + per-field normalizers for the geocode-first matcher. Address-first: the canonical PostalAddress record composes parser components, the formatter's match key, and a resolved geocode; organization + contact records build on the same canonical record.

components.name: @mailwoman/registry
components.description: The geocode-first record-matching application: resolve messy contact/organization records into canonical, geocoded entities (block → score → cluster) and export them as GeoJSON for spatial analysis. The clinic-funding use case mailwoman was built for.

components.name: @mailwoman/resolver
components.description: The address resolver: walk an AddressTree, decorate nodes with gazetteer-supplied coordinates + attribution. Backend-agnostic (any ResolverBackend), with the span-rescore + postcode-consistency levers. Lifted out of @mailwoman/core so it can depend on @mailwoman/spatial (haversine) + @mailwoman/codex (USPS directionals) instead of reinventing them; the type contract stays in core so the pipeline composes it without a cycle.

components.name: @mailwoman/resolver-wof-sqlite
components.description: Who's On First SQLite resolver — FTS5-backed PlaceLookup that resolves text queries to WOF place IDs + coordinates. Optional dependency for callers who want geocoding.

components.name: @mailwoman/spatial
components.description: Spatial analysis, geocoding, and other geo-related utilities.

components.name: @mailwoman/tiger
components.description: US Census TIGER/Line data processing and analysis.
